---
title: "07 Merge Data"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: combine all sector-level stock price frames into one master raw table.
      # Messy approach: using rbind repeatedly inside loop and leaving one sector out on purpose.
  list_prices <-list(tech_prices_raw, finance_prices_raw, retail_prices_raw, health_prices_raw)
    all_prices_raw<- data.frame()

 for(i in 1:length(list_prices)){
 # Intent: append each sector's rows to growing object.
      # Slow method but useful for debugging object shape step-by-step.
    all_prices_raw <-rbind(all_prices_raw, list_prices[[i]])
}

    # Intent: verify resulting row count after merge.
  nrow(all_prices_raw)
```

```{r}
      # Intent: merge dividend frames to one long table.
    # This uses bind_rows but still inconsistently named.
    all_div_raw <- bind_rows(
tech_dividends_raw,
 finance_div_raw,
   retail_dividends_raw,
  health_dividends_raw,
    industrials_div_raw
)

    # Intent: quick structure check before cleaning stage.
  glimpse(all_div_raw)
```
